title: Trussful
description:
just the Trusses from the factor must grow.
Along some others
body:
Hello, if you found this mod you probably ran into the same issue I did when useing the factor must grow addon for create that you only liked the trusses and maybe wished for more of them even so yea thats what this mod adds theres a list below if you want to check
Credits to [The Factor must grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) for the base trusses 

-Copper Truss
-Steel Truss
-Aluminum Truss
-Cast Iron Truss
-Nickle Truss
-Brass Truss
-Lead Truss
-Zinc Truss

To be added
-Netherite Truss(done)
-Bronze Truss(done)
-Tin Truss
-Iron Truss "Possible Immersive Weathering Compad"

"and btw you kinda need Create planetary tweaks buts not fully needed its just for the stonecutting recipes I think if there are any same ingots"
